🎬 Media Streaming

Host and stream your own video, music, and photos — open source alternatives to Netflix, Spotify and Google Photos.

Popular SaaS in this category

Tap any tool to see curated open source alternatives with honest strengths and weaknesses.

Subscription video streaming.

Alternatives to Google Photos

Ad slot — category middle

Open source projects in this category

Jellyfin

Open source media server — stream your movies, shows, and music.

License: GPL-2.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Navidrome

Self-hosted Spotify alternative — your music, your server.

License: GPL-3.0 Self-host: ★☆☆☆☆

Immich

Open source Google Photos alternative with ML tagging.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

PhotoPrism

AI-powered photo library you can self-host.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆
